info.english_meaning: to accomplish to attain to fulfill to achieve
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: rADnoti saMsidDyarTe SnO rADyet vfdDAvakarmakAt ' (Slo. 122) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'apEtenArAtsIrasO svAhA' (aTarva॰5.6.7) apArAtsIH=aparADamacArIH duzkftamakArzIH apAcArIH apaSabdo DAtvarTaM viparItayati
'antyajAtidvijAtiM tu yenANgenAparADnuyAt tattadeva cCedayettasya' (agnipu॰) atrAparADirhiMsAyAM vartate
'rADo hiMsAyAm' (6.4.123) sUtre vfttO apareDatuH apareDuriti hiMsAdyotanAyApapUrvasya rADeretvAByAsalopO darSitO
'yezAM yuDizWiro rAjA kasmAdDarme'parADnuyuH' (BA॰vi॰52.6) apacareyurityarTaH
'Darme ca nAparADnoti' (BA॰SAM॰71.1) uBayatra sOvAdiko'pi rADirakarmakaH anyatrApi taTA
'yadi bIBatsurAyAtastadA kasyAparADnumaH' (BA॰vi॰47.8)
'yayA(ipvA)'pEva rAGnoti' (Sa॰brA॰5.3.5.29) yA'syezuraparADyatItyAha
'yaTA gatvA kAzWAmaparADnuyAt tAdfktat' (E॰brA॰4.9) sKalanapatanAdirUpamaparADaM kuryAdityAha
'mamApi so'parADnoti yo yuzmAkamasOmyakft' (BA॰karRa॰33.41) mayyapyapacarati mayyapyaparAdDo Bavati
'evaM strI nAparADnoti nara evAparADyati' (BA॰SAM॰266.38) aparADnoti=dozaBAgBavati SyanvikaraRastu divAdI rADirnEyatyenAkarmakaH
'kaccinnu rAjaputri te sapatnI cEtravAhanI citrANgadA varArohA nAparADyati kiYcana' (BA॰ASva॰81.4) 'te' iti caturTyantam ukto'rTaH
'dEvaM tatrAparADyati' (rA॰6.101.9) viDerayaM doza ityAha
'yOvanamatrAparADyati na cAritryam' (mfcCa॰9) yOvanamatrArTe dozaBAjanaM BavatItyarTaH
'sEzA kiM cAparADyati' (kaTA॰21.80) kamAcAramuccarate? kenAparADena tadvatI Bavati
'kaH kasyehAparADyati' (BA॰SAM॰139.49) ityAdizUdAhftizvakarmakatA rADyate rADA Bavati
'na dUye sAtvatIsUnuryanmahyamaparADyati' (SiSu॰2.11) SiSupAlo me druhyatItyAha
'taTA nastvaM gOtama mA'parADAstava ca pitAmahA yaTA' (Sa॰brA॰14.9.1.11) avaSyamupehi naH asanniDAnenAparAdDo mA BUrityAha pratyakzAdipramAsidDavirudDArTABiDAyinaH
'vedAntA yadi SAstrARi bOdDEH kimaparADyate' (pra॰ca॰2.4).. ko'parADaH kripate kiM viGawayate kiM vikriyata ityAha
'sarvakAryezvaparADyatvAnnAparADyanti cANganAH' (BA॰SAM॰266.40) sarvakAryezvaparADyatvAdanuroDyatvAvalpabalatvena sarvaTA puruzADInatvAnnAparADyanti (dozaBAjo na Bavanti) iti nIlakaRWaH
'provAca kosalapatiH praTamAparAdDaH' (raGu॰9.79) praTamamaparADaM kftavAn kartari ktaH akarmakatvAt
'kiM punarasurAvalepena BavatInAmaparAdDam' (vikrama॰1) BAve ktaH akarmakatvAt ko'parADaH kftaH ko vyatikramo'nuzWita ityarTaH
'nimittAdaparAdDezorDAnuzkasyeva valgitam' (SiSu॰2.27) nimittam=lakzyam aparAdDezuH=cyutasAyakaH
aparAdDA'BizekavelopADyAyasya (vidDa॰3) aparAdDA=atikrAntA sakarmako'tra rADiH sOvAdiko vedyaH karmaRi ktaH
'etadvA anaparAdDaM nakzatraM yatsUryaH (Sa॰brA॰2.1.2.19) akarmako divAdirDAtuH kartari ktaH
'evaM ko vA'parADnotyamumavigaRayan bAhumatreti Guzyam' (campU0 BA0 250) atra mayi ko'parADnotyaparADyati aparADamAcarati SnuvikaraRopi rADiratrAkarmakaH
'saMrADayantaH saDurAScarantaH' (aTarva॰3.30.5) saMrADayantaH=Ekyam EkamatyaM gatAH parasparamanukUlAH
'tasyAM na samarADayan' (tE॰saM॰2.10.4) tasyAM tasyA vizaye na matisaMvAdamupAyannityAha
'avEtenArAtsIrasO svAhA' (aTarva0 566) avarAtsIH=avArAtsIH=vyfDyasi=na Bavasi=na siDyasi=na sidDArTo Bavasi
'yaTEva zaqavarADnoti sa riktaH' (E0 brA0 37) zaw Cabdo vazawkAramAha avarADnoti samfdDyaBAvamApnoti
'saM Srutena gamemahi mA Srutena vi rADizi' (aTarva0 114) Srutena viyukto mA BUvam
'mA prajayA pratigfhya vi rADizi' (aTarva0 3298)
'tenAhaM satyena mA virADizi brahmaRA' (CAM0 upa0 3112) ukto'rTaH
'kriyAsamaBihAreRa virADyantaM kzameta kaH' (SiSu0 243) virADyantaM druhyantam apakurvantam
'na hi tadviDAnAM janapravAdasampAdanABirADyA guRaviBUtiH' (avadA0 SrezWi0 jA0) aBirADyA sADyA
'tarhi kIwikAdiBiH kiM tava virAdDam' (syAdvAda0) virAdDamaparAdDam
'SUdrastu vfttimAkANkzan kzatramArADayedyadi' (manu0 10121) ArADayet paricaryayA raYjayet
'ArADayati DarmajYaH paralokaM jitendriyaH' (rA0 2606) ArADayati sADayati Apnoti
'yadi vA jAnakImapi ArADanAya lokAnAM muYcato nAsti me vyaTA' (uttara0 112) ArADanamanuraYjanam prIRanam
'sambanDe viparItameva tadaBUdArADanaM te mayi' (uttara0 417) ArADanaM satkriyA saBAjanamarhaRA
'mantrArADanatatpareRa manasA nItAH SmaSAne niSAH' (Bartf0 ) ArADanaM sADanaM vaSIkaraRam
'aBirAdDadevatAvitIrRavIryAtiSayAn' (SiSu0 171) aBirAdDA ArAdDAH
'pratiritsAmi jihiMsizAmi' (pA0 7454) ityatra sani rADo hiMsAyAmaca is vaktavya iti vArtikam pratiSabdo hiMsArTasya dyotakaH
'tasya ha pratirAdDasya treDA sADukftyA vinaSyati' (jE0 brA0 146) pratirAdDo hiMsitaH kzataH
'rADo hiMsAyAm' (64123) ityatra rADerhiMsArTaH svIkftaH
'dravyApacaye tryavaraM pratirAdDaH' (gO0 Da0 348) pratirAdvo'BiyuktaH
'pratirADena vE devA asurAn pratirADya' (E0 brA0 633) pratirADya pratikUlamAcarya aBiBUya
